name: Smoked Salmon Cheescake
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Smoked salmon, finely flaked, with skin and bones removed
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crust, in a small mixing bowl combine crumbs and melted margarine or butter. Press the crumb mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch quiche dish. Set aside.
2. For the filling, in a large mixing bowl use a fork to beat eggs slightly. Stir in ricotta cheese and Swiss cheese. Stir in evaporated skim milk, smoked salmon, dill weed, salt, and white pepper.
3. If making ahead, cover and chill until ready to bake, up to 6 hours.
4. To bake, pour the filling into the prepared quiche dish. Bake in a 350°F oven for 35 to 40 minutes or until the center is nearly set when shaken.
5. Remove from the oven and cool slightly in the pan or on a wire rack. Serve warm.
6. To serve, cut into wedges. Top with a dollop of sour cream and a sprig of dill if desired.
7. To reheat one slice of chilled cheesecake in the microwave, place it on a microwave-safe plate. Cover loosely with microwave-safe plastic wrap. Microwave at 50% power for about 40 seconds.
